name: construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For construction project accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate reconciliation of vendor invoices and purchase orders.
features: manual entry of invoices and purchase orders
